title: Refactoring PufferLib Trainer into a Class and Integrating Custom CUDA Ops
summary: Worked on refactoring Clean Puffer's trainer into a class structure to improve readability and maintainability. Debugged missing imports in non-recurrent policies and fixed CUDA extension registration with PyTorch custom operators, eliminating pybind11 dependency. Continued line-by-line cleanup of the training code, cutting lines and improving logical grouping.
